title: echoes of the abyss feat. Zillick
description: Exploring personal growth and overcoming adversity.
lyrics:
Oh, you got me thinking about it all I still feel you and your words from all the
abyss that you brought on me The words you say are nice at first
We find that's just not where it's at It's not the truth
When it's always tit for tat You're not to blame, well, that's a shame
I hear your voice from the echoes of the abyss
My heart, it did not miss Your touch, that painful bliss
I don't miss it A blessing in disguise
Oh, it's gonna be over soon, yeah
There's gonna be truth here There's gonna be truth here
Echoes, echoes There's gonna be a truth in the dark
There's truth in the part that makes you rise up and be more
then you could ever think to be here
And now we find All the lies that you said
All the things that you took from me Of the, of the abyss
Echoes Echoes
Talked to my fears, said, you don't live here
Rent free  fear, said, cool, but you'll never exempt me
Chains in my cadence, but pain is a rhythm
Turn every wound into bars, now I’m with ’em they say know your place
Said, watch me erupt from a spark in the dark to a nuclear
Thrust If silence is death, I'm immortal in sound
Every time I speak, Im unearthing the ground
Echo In my sound, I'll suffocate the lies I hate
I'm done being small for your comfortable fate
I hit bottom, found a mic in a grave,  turned  panic into power
Now I'm louder than the pain you caused
All the nights that you lost on me
Scream into the void
Till it bleeds my name
I found my truth in the static, found my God in the flame
I was silent, surviving, now I'm paranoid
With a voice sharp enough to cut through your void
As I scream into the void
It all collapses, turns the abyss into light
Watch the dark, practice if you're waiting for the sign
This is it, you don't need anything but just to be you
Yeah, And find your voice, it comes from the abyss in us
It all comes from the abyss and us
And us
